commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 2026-07-14

NYSE dominates with the tightest composite ranking, combining low Amihud illiquidity (0.0072) and moderate spreads (0.6283%). Nasdaq 100 presents an intriguing paradox—exceptional ILLIQ efficiency (0.0025) undercut by wider spreads (0.7066%), suggesting strong volume masks execution friction. Korea Exchange trails significantly, with ILLIQ at 0.1360 and spreads exceeding 1.35%, indicating structural liquidity constraints. European exchanges occupy the middle tier, with Euronext's tight spreads offset by moderate illiquidity costs.
